nasb.text: And though they found no ground for putting Him to death, they asked Pilate that He be executed.

esv.text: And though they found in him no guilt worthy of death, they asked Pilate to have him executed.

cnv.text: 他們雖然找不出該死的罪狀，還是要求彼拉多殺害他。

ccb.text: 他们虽然找不到判祂死罪的理由，却强求彼拉多将祂处死。

csbs.text: 他们虽然找不到处死他的任何理由，还是求彼拉多杀了他。
